label: [M] static soundness audit (circomspect; a third-party cryptographic audit remains [F])

publicSignalConstraintCoverage.issuerKeyHash: binding square (triaged) + verifier on-chain equality off-circuit
publicSignalConstraintCoverage.nonce: binding square (triaged) + verifier freshness check off-circuit

findings.message: Intermediate signals should typically occur in at least two separate constraints.
findings.justification: Intentional statement-binding square: anchors the verifier-chosen public nonce into the constraint system so it cannot be dangling. The square itself carries no semantic value; the canonical anchoring pattern (cf. tornado-core recipientSquare).

findings.message: Intermediate signals should typically occur in at least two separate constraints.
findings.justification: Intentional statement-binding square for the public issuerKeyHash (its semantic check — equality with Poseidon(pk_issuer resolved on-chain) — is the verifier's off-circuit duty per the two-phase design).
